localized_texts.text: JDT Stadium Tour (Home Team Changing Room Closed for Renovation)

JDT Stadium Tour – Discover the Pride of JohorStep inside the home of champions and experience the heartbeat of Johor Darul Ta’zim Football Club!The JDT Stadium Tour offers an exclusive behind-the-scenes journey through one of Malaysia’s most iconic football arenas.Visitors will get the rare opportunity to explore the Players’ Lounge, Changing Rooms, Warm-up Area, Media Zone, and the World-Class Football Pitch, where unforgettable moments are made.Interactive Experience: Engage with immersive displays featuring JDT’s iconic moments, championship trophies, and vibrant fan culture, bringing the club’s legacy to life.Walk through the players’ tunnel, feel the energy of the stadium, and stand pitch-side where football history is written.Whether you’re a passionate football fan or an inspired visitor, the JDT Stadium Tour promises an unforgettable journey of sportsmanship, pride, and the spirit of Johor.
Players’ Lounge – A premium space designed for comfort and recovery, where players unwind, dine, and connect before and after the match.
Changing Room – Professionally equipped for preparation, shower, and tactical discussions — the team’s inner sanctum before battle.
Warm-up Room – A focused environment for pre-match stretches and physical readiness, ensuring peak performance on the field.
Football Pitch – A world-class natural grass arena where passion, teamwork, and sporting excellence come alive.
Media & Medical Zone – Featuring a professional interview room and a fully equipped medical facility to support player welfare and media coverage.

Get ready for an exclusive behind-the-scenes journey into the heart of Johor Darul Ta’zim Football Club!During the JDT Stadium Tour, visitors will experience:- A guided tour of the state-of-the-art JDT Stadium, home of the Southern Tigers.- Access to the Players’ Lounge, Changing Room, Warm-up Room, and Media Zone.- A chance to step onto the world-class football pitch and capture unforgettable photos.- Interactive exhibits showcasing JDT’s trophies, milestones, and fan culture.- Perfect photo opportunities throughout the stadium, including the players’ tunnel and iconic viewpoints.Whether you’re a football enthusiast or a curious visitor, this tour promises an inspiring look into JDT’s passion, pride, and championship legacy.
Tour Duration: Approximately 45–60 minutes.
Tour Schedule: Please arrive 30 minutes before your selected time slot.
Tickets: Each ticket admits one person only; children under 12 must be accompanied by an adult.
Restrictions: Certain areas may be temporarily closed due to maintenance or private events.
Bags & Personal Items: Backpacks and large handbags are not allowed inside the stadium. Storage space is available at the ticket counter for safe keeping.
Parking: Visitors may park at Parking Zone 5. The ticket counter is conveniently located right in front of the parking area.
Photography: Allowed in most areas; please follow the guide’s instructions.
Attire: Comfortable clothing and non-marking shoes are recommended.
Safety: Follow all safety guidelines and do not enter restricted zones.
Non-refundable: Tickets are non-refundable and non-transferable once purchased.
What’s included: Tour Duration: 60 Minutes
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: At Ticketing Counter
How to use: Ticket Redemption Counter: Stadium Sultan Ibrahim (In front of parking zone number 5)

Terms & Conditions: Each ticket allows admission for one person only. Children below 3 years old and disabled individuals accompanying a ticket holder are admitted free of charge. (Please come to our ticket counter and mention to staff) All tickets must be redeemed at least 30 minutes before each chosen time slot and tours must commence at the JDT Hummer Tour Counter, located in front of parking zone number 5 at Stadium Sultan Ibrahim. Any interim special event or training session from the stadium and cause the tickets that have been sold cannot be redeemed for the visit, stadium management will assist on the change of the visitor to another visit time or will proceed refund.
Cancellation Policy: No cancellation for this activity as per vendor policy
